title: rungia parviflora var. pectinata
intro: Rungia parviflora var. pectinata, also known as the lesser Rungia or small Rungia, is a plant species belonging to the Lamiaceae family, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Rungia parviflora var. pectinata include its ability to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Rungia parviflora var. pectinata can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
